Class AnthropicChatOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.anthropic.AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.anthropic.AnthropicChatOptions.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>, StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>
Enclosing class:
AnthropicChatOptions
public static class AnthropicChatOptions.Builder extends AnthropicChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<AnthropicChatOptions.Builder>
Builder for creating AnthropicChatOptions instances.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Alexandros Pappas, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, Soby Chacko, Austin Dase, Sebastien Deleuze
